title: 10 health benefits of Cola glabra (bitter kola)
intro: Cola glabra has health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and viral infections, and improving respiratory issues. Its medicinal properties include its antibacterial, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory compounds. For example, bitter kola can help alleviate bronchitis symptoms by loosening mucus in the lungs, making it easier to breathe. It can also boost the immune system, reducing the severity of colds and flu. By incorporating bitter kola into their daily routine, individuals may experience improved overall health and well-being.
